ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, the reference setting will use regex to pick which property to use as the reference for dates based on the first regex match.
ast.target: 如果启用，引用设置将使用正则表达式，根据第一个匹配项来选择用作日期引用的属性。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Specify the property name or regex to find which property to use as the reference for dates, if available.
ast.target: 指定属性名称或正则表达式，以查找可用作日期引用的属性。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The file date to use as the default reference if no property is found.
ast.target: 如果未找到属性，将使用文件日期作为默认引用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The sorting to be used if not specified in source block
ast.target: 如果源代码块中未指定，则使用的排序方式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If sections are separated by single lines instead of double lines
ast.target: 如果章节由单行分隔而不是双行分隔。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, the timeline will display the exact date and time written in the text, respecting timezones like (EST) or (JST). By default, it sorts events by their absolute global time.
ast.target: 如果启用，时间线将显示文本中写入的确切日期和时间，并尊重时区（如 EST 或 JST）。默认情况下，它按事件的绝对全球时间排序。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, the timeline will sort events by their local time (ignoring timezone differences) instead of their absolute global time.
ast.target: 如果启用，时间线将按事件的本地时间（忽略时区差异）而不是绝对全球时间排序。

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: 输入标签（不带井号 #）或正则表达式
